name: Protein Solubilization
description: Creates soluble analogues to integral membrane proteins (e.g. GPCRs). Runs iterative AlphaFold protocol (with ColabDesign) to generate backbones, followed by SolubleMPNN to generate sequences. Uses 500 rounds of optimization for ColabDesign and 2 sequences per backbone for SolubleMPNN.
capabilities: Creates soluble analogues to integral membrane proteins (e.g. GPCRs)
Runs iterative AlphaFold protocol (with ColabDesign) to generate backbones, followed by SolubleMPNN to generate sequences
Uses 500 rounds of optimization for ColabDesign and 2 sequences per backbone for SolubleMPNN

pdbFile.description: Integral membrane protein structure (e.g., GPCR) in PDB format

numDesigns.description: Number of soluble analogue sequences to generate per backbone (SolubleMPNN)
